notes: Game crashes at Startup with a Wine C++ Runtime Error.
title: Planet Zoo

notes: Game crashed immediately with "a C++ error", but continued running according to Steam. It also left some zombie processes in the background. Disabling esync and DXVK didn't change anything. Playing around with different versions of Proton also had no effect.
title: Planet Zoo
